rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday November 22, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION Motion For Attorneys Fees GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall recover $158,098 in fees and $11,239.90 in pre-judgment interest accrued from July 22, 2016 to August 22, 2016. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: CAN TANG YU ET AL VS. MICHAEL HO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of Plaintiffs And Cross-Defendants Can Tang Yu, Yan Wang, And Sunway Floors Cabinets Inc. To Compel Arbitration, Consolidate Arbitration Proceedings, And Stay Action Pending Conclusion Of Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday November 22, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF CAN YU, YAN WANG, SUNWAY FLOOR CABINETS INC. Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of Plaintiffs And Cross-Defendants Can Tang Yu, Yan Wang, And Sunway Floors Cabinets Inc. To Compel Arbitration, Consolidate Arbitration Proceedings, And Stay Action Pending Conclusion Of Arbitration continued to December 7, 2016. Opposing party is order to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than November 23, 2106 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. ESTRELLA REYES DE JESUS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Plaintiff'S Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No. 1 And Imposing Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Lelise M. Klott In Support Thereof; Proposed Order Thereon
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday November 22, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Plaintiff'S Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No. 1 And Imposing Monetary Sanctions granted, subject to opposition. Responses without objections must be served within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $490. =(501/SRB)
